回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(二) (English(ll))	開課班級 : 日大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
In this class, students will be able to 1. Develop deeper understanding and multi-faceted perceptions of the world's cultures. 2. Explore, think, and then present to the class our response to the topic of the week. 3. Develop critical reading and thinking skills. 4. Appreciate major themes in the textbook and diversified cultures. 5. Use and familiarize yourself with the vocabulary of the week's topic in class presentation.  


2.教學綱要
English(I) is a course for freshmen. There are some learning contexts which brings the world English into the classroom through Geographic topics, videos and visuals. First, in the Reading skills sections, one academic strategy will be explicitly instructed and practiced to enhance reading comprehension. Besides, the updated designed blends text, charts, graphs and images which improve comprehension skills will be demonstrated to develop students' visual literacy skills. Furthermore, the opportunities to synthesize information through the multiple sources from National Geographic videos will be engaged in some period of classes. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : 自編教材　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Quizzes: 18%; Midterm: 25%; Final exam: 25%; Attendance, class learning-sheet participation: 20% Homework: 12% 
1. Self-respect at all aspects. 2. No any smart phone allowed. 3. Absence or any late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with the professor.  
Extra credit of the blue-card for early birds or active learners with volunteering attitudes 用書數量不多，請同學於第一週自行前往大雅書局訂書預付款 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
